message:
feat(FJ-P2C-006-D2): backend capabilities, registry, and platform routing

BackendCapabilities struct (supported_dtypes, max_tensor_rank,
memory_limit_bytes, multi_device). BackendRegistry with get(),
default_backend(), resolve_placement(), and resolve_with_fallback()
for hardened mode CPU fallback. 14 new tests covering capability
queries, registry lookup, and routing resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
